name: Next.js
label: Next.js
notes: SSR/Hybrid — React. Verified 2026-05-28 via npm registry.

name: Lit
label: Lit
notes: CSR — Google Web Components library (6 kB)

name: ws
label: ws
notes: Protocol — WebSocket Node.js (80M+ weekly npm downloads)

name: gorilla/websocket
label: gorilla/websocket
notes: Protocol — WebSocket Go (archived — use nhooyr for new projects)

name: Dependabot
label: Dependabot
notes: GitHub-native dep updates. No version pin.

name: gitleaks
label: gitleaks
notes: Secret scan — pre-commit + CI. License: MIT.

name: grype
label: grype
notes: Container image CVE scan. License: Apache 2.0. Pin version — reproducible only if CI runner image is also locked.

name: syft
label: syft
notes: SBOM generator (SPDX + CycloneDX). License: Apache 2.0. Pin version — reproducible only if CI runner image is also locked.

name: cosign
label: cosign
notes: Keyless image signing via Sigstore. License: Apache 2.0. Pin version — reproducible only if CI runner image is also locked.

name: Alpine Linux
label: Alpine Linux
notes: Container-optimized. musl libc. No shell by default.

name: Google COS
label: Google COS
notes: GKE node OS only — not a Dockerfile FROM.

name: Wolfi / Chainguard
label: Wolfi / Chainguard
notes: SLSA-aware. Zero CVE target. glibc + musl.

name: Distroless (Google)
label: Distroless (Google)
notes: No shell. No package manager. Minimal attack surface.

name: scratch
label: scratch
notes: Empty image. Use only for static binaries.

name: FIPS 140-2
label: FIPS 140-2
notes: Superseded by 140-3. NIST closes new submissions Sept 2026.

name: FedRAMP Moderate
label: FedRAMP Moderate
notes: US federal cloud. Requires FIPS + STIG base.

name: HIPAA
label: HIPAA
notes: US health data. No version number — law.

name: PCI DSS
label: PCI DSS
notes: Payment card security. v4.0 mandatory from March 2025.

name: SOX ITGC
label: SOX ITGC
notes: US public company financial controls. No version.

name: CIS Benchmarks
label: CIS Benchmarks
notes: Center for Internet Security. Linux + Docker configs.

name: DISA STIG
label: DISA STIG
notes: DoD hardening. Per-distro STIGs published separately.

name: GDPR
label: GDPR
notes: EU data protection. Regulation — no version.

name: SLSA
label: SLSA
notes: Supply chain security framework. L3 = highest CI/CD.
